pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 49: INSERT INTO courses with short_name='ENG101' and title='Introduction to Literature'
task.json description explicitly states 'Change the Room from 101 to 205' as the target requirement. Room 205 is not pre-created in database setup; user must enter this value to complete the task.
setup_task.sh line 38: school_periods INSERT with (3, $SYEAR, 1, 3, 'Period 3', '3', 50, 'Y') - period 3 has short_name='3'
setup_task.sh line 38: school_periods INSERT for period 3 with title='Period 3'
setup_task.sh line 65: course_periods INSERT with room='101'. Also line 57 comment: 'Create Course Section (Period 1, Room 101)'
setup_task.sh line 65: course_periods INSERT with period_id=1. Line 36 shows Period 1 has short_name='1'

privileged_info_summary: The task reschedule_course_section requires moving an OpenSIS course section for 'Introduction to Literature' (ENG101) from its initial configuration of Period 1 / Room 101 to the target configuration of Period 3 / Room 205. The system setup creates all periods 1-5 with matching short_names (1-5) and standard period titles (Period 1-5) in a MariaDB database. The course ENG101 and its initial section are pre-configured with room='101' and period_id=1. Target room '205' must be entered by the user through the OpenSIS UI. The data is entirely synthetic, created by setup scripts specifically for this task.
